improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional AI support for trade and business decisions. Try Gideon free, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: These tags improve search visibility by clearly communicating Gideon's value proposition within the 155-character meta description limit. The OG and Twitter tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial and entry price creates urgency without fabricating claims. Placeholder og:image should be replaced with an actual branded asset.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product name and core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while targeting the specific audience. Ending with the free trial offer and removing friction (no card required) drives conversions by lowering commitment anxiety.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces uncertainty and positions the paywall as an upgrade rather than a barrier. This builds trust and supports conversion.
